prompt.en: She ___ to school every day.
prompt.zh: 选出正确的答案。She ___ to school every day.

explain.en: The verb must agree with the subject, so "goes" is correct.
explain.zh: 正确答案是 "goes"（主谓一致：动词形式要与主语配合）。

explain.en: The verb must agree with the subject, so "eat" is correct.

prompt.en: Yesterday, I ___ an apple for breakfast.

explain.en: This sentence describes a completed past action, so "ate" is correct.
explain.zh: 正确答案是 "ate"（一般过去式，表示已完成的动作）。

prompt.en: She ___ to the market last Sunday.
prompt.zh: 选出正确的答案。She ___ to the market last Sunday.

explain.en: This sentence describes a completed past action, so "went" is correct.

explain.en: This sentence describes a completed past action, so "watched" is correct.

prompt.en: Look! The dog ___ in the park.
prompt.zh: 选出正确的答案。Look! The dog ___ in the park.

explain.en: This describes an action happening now (or a fixed future plan), so "is running" is correct.
explain.zh: 正确答案是 "is running"（现在进行式：be 动词 + 动词-ing）。

prompt.en: Listen! The birds ___ outside.

prompt.en: An elephant is ___ than a mouse. (big)
